name: Caveman
short_description: caveman is a side view runner, you play as a caveman running away from a dangerous predator.
detailed_description: Test your reaction, make the character jump in time and overcome obstacles and use. At the levels, you can find special perks that change the gameplay, for example, speeding up the character, or you can saddle a dragon, turn upside down, and much more.
about_the_game: Test your reaction, make the character jump in time and overcome obstacles and use. At the levels, you can find special perks that change the gameplay, for example, speeding up the character, or you can saddle a dragon, turn upside down, and much more.
